nearest_gene_label: EMCN / PPP3CA / SLC39A8 / MANBA / TACR3 (chr4 segment members)
melanocyte_eqtl_gene: none (no passenger is a melanocyte eGene)
confirming_experiment: Fine-map/functional dissection of the ~1.7Mb homozygous segment to find the true albino-causal variant
notes: chr4 ~1.7Mb homozygous segment shared by 3 albinos; EMCN/PPP3CA/SLC39A8/MANBA/TACR3 are CO-SEGREGATING PASSENGERS. None is a melanocyte eGene, none in melanogenesis core. Only PPP3CA touches core via generic STRING->calmodulin. Honest negative.

confirming_experiment: Melanocyte-specific LRMDA knockout / rescue and melanin quantification (already an OCA7 model exists)
notes: LRMDA = "leucine-rich melanocyte differentiation associated" = OCA7 (autosomal-recessive oculocutaneous albinism 7). It IS a bona fide pigmentation effector; the effector-uncertain label was WRONG. Melanocyte eQTL (as alias C10orf11) confirms it is a strong melanocyte eGene. STRONGEST connection.

rsid: rs116218201 (representative); cluster also rs113236485, rs115102845, rs185469828
notes: SYT6 (synaptotagmin 6). Not a melanocyte eGene, absent from substrate/core, no edges. Authors: low MAF, "none warrant further investigation." Note SYTL2 (a different synaptotagmin-LIKE) is pigment-relevant, but SYT6 is not. Honest negative.
KALRN (kalirin RhoGEF kinase, neuronal). Not a melanocyte eGene, absent from substrate/core, no path. Authors: low MAF, stated unknown. Honest negative.

Bulk L2G resolved TECRL (trans-2,3-enoyl-CoA reductase-like; cardiac arrhythmia gene). Melanocyte eQTL does NOT reproduce this - TECRL is NOT a melanocyte eGene. No pigment mechanism. Honest negative; melanocyte data contradicts the bulk resolution by silence.

melanocyte_eqtl_gene: none (POMC not a melanocyte eGene in Zhang list)
confirming_experiment: If pursued: eQTL/reporter test whether rs12233134 alters POMC vs EFR3B expression in melanocytes
notes: Nearest=EFR3B but POMC (alpha-MSH precursor, MC1R ligand) sits at the locus and IS effectively canonical. p_adj=0.2653 NOT significant. Even the canonical-neighbour interpretation is not supported by significance. Flag: canonical-neighbour, non-significant.

melanocyte_eqtl_gene: IRF4 (melanocyte coloc CLPP=1.00, Zhang T-S15; melanocyte eGene q=1.96e-10)
connecting_edges: IRF4 in Reactome pigmentation subpathway; IRF4->EP300/CREBBP (STRING)
confirming_experiment: Already done by Zhang: melanocyte coloc localises the 6p25.3 pigment signal to IRF4 (CLPP=1.0)
notes: IRF4 IS a canonical effector. Melanocyte coloc (CLPP=1.0) and melanocyte eGene status place the 6p25.3 signal squarely on IRF4. IRF4 trans-regulates NEO1/PLA1A/TMEM140 (Zhang T-S10) but those are DOWNSTREAM of canonical IRF4, not a rescue. Acts on canonical neighbour -> NOT our finding.
IPCEF1/CNKSR3 near OPRM1 (opioid receptor). None is a melanocyte eGene, none in substrate/core. CNKSR3 p_adj=0.029 marginal. No pigment mechanism. Honest negative.

connection_route: GRN regulon (MITF represses EGFR; PAX3 activates)
connecting_edges: MITF-|EGFR (GRN tier B); PAX3->EGFR (CollecTRI); EGFR-HRAS (Raghunath T0)
confirming_experiment: ChIP + reporter: test MITF/PAX3 occupancy and rs12668421 allele effect on EGFR in melanocytes
notes: EGFR is a genuine MITF/PAX3 regulon target (GRN layer UNIQUELY enables this). Non-circular network route. BUT the GWAS signal is null in Ang2023 (p_adj=0.78, not replicated) - the connection is real, the locus is weak. EGFR is a downstream/parallel target, not a pigment-synthesis effector.

near EMX2 (intergenic); bulk resolved RAB11FIP2 (Rab11 recycling effector). Neither is a melanocyte eGene; neither in substrate/core. Melanocyte data silent - does not support bulk RAB11FIP2 call. p_adj=0.62. Honest negative.

melanocyte_eqtl_gene: none (GRM5 not a melanocyte eGene; TYR is)
connecting_edges: TYR: MITF/SOX10/PAX3 targets (GRN A); TYR-MITF (Raghunath T0, 5 layers); Bajpai hit
confirming_experiment: Fine-map/eQTL: does rs7118677 act on TYR or GRM5 in melanocytes?
notes: Nearest=GRM5 (glutamate receptor) but TYR (THE melanogenesis enzyme) sits at 11q14. p_adj=0.00098, replicated. GRM5 itself has NO melanocyte eGene / substrate / core evidence. The classic 11q14 pigment signal is TYR. Acts on canonical neighbour TYR -> NOT our finding.

melanocyte_eqtl_gene: SLC24A4 (melanocyte coloc CLPP=0.463, Zhang T-S15; melanocyte eGene q=5.35e-10)
connecting_edges: SLC24A4 melanocyte coloc + eGene + Bajpai hit
confirming_experiment: Done by Zhang: melanocyte coloc localises 14q32 pigment signal to SLC24A4 (CLPP=0.46)
notes: SLC24A4 IS a canonical pigmentation effector. rs12896399 is the classic SLC24A4 SNP. Melanocyte coloc confirms SLC24A4 (CLPP=0.46; weak secondary UBR7 CLPP=0.04). Acts on canonical neighbour -> NOT our finding.

melanocyte_eqtl_gene: none (ATRN not a melanocyte eGene in Zhang)
connecting_edges: ATRN modifies ASIP(agouti)->MC1R pigment-type switching (mouse mahogany); not in our network layers
confirming_experiment: Melanocyte co-culture / keratinocyte-ASIP assay: test whether ATRN modulates ASIP-MC1R signaling for the risk allele
notes: ATRN = attractin = mouse mahogany coat-colour modifier (verified: membrane isoform ~ mouse mahogany protein). Genuine pigmentation modifier via agouti/ASIP-MC1R axis. NOT captured by any of our network layers (substrate/GRN/Reactome/melanocyte-eQTL all silent) - known biology UNIQUELY enables. GWAS null in Ang2023 (p_adj=0.14), so mechanism is real but this specific signal is weak.

nearest_gene_label: FANCA/SPIRE2 (nearest-gene label; functional target = MC1R regulation)
melanocyte_eqtl_gene: SPIRE2 weak in hair-color coloc (CLPP=0.02, different cytoband); MC1R is functional target
connecting_edges: MC1R: MITF target (GRN D); MC1R-USF1/ADCY4 (Raghunath T0)
confirming_experiment: Reporter/CRISPRi of the ~97kb-5' element on MC1R expression in melanocytes
notes: rs34357723 ~97kb 5' of MC1R; Morgan2018 explicitly: strongest MC1R-region signal is REGULATORY (not coding). Nearest label FANCA/SPIRE2 are annotation artifacts. Functional target = MC1R (canonical). Acts on canonical neighbour -> NOT our finding, but a genuine MC1R cis-regulatory signal.

confirming_experiment: Melanocyte + hair-follicle MSX2 perturbation; check if rs6876712 is a melanocyte eQTL in a larger panel
notes: MSX2 (msh homeobox 2) - transcriptional repressor, neural-crest/hair-follicle role. p=4.9e-19 highly significant. Plausible pigmentation link via hair-follicle biology but NO connection in any of our network layers and NOT a melanocyte eGene. Needs manual paper review - strong statistics, weak mechanistic anchor.

connection_route: statistical epistasis with MC1R (not a mechanistic edge)
confirming_experiment: Test the reported PKHD1 x MC1R V60L epistasis in an independent cohort; melanocyte functional follow-up
notes: PKHD1 (fibrocystin; polycystic kidney disease). p=2.8e-28. Morgan2018 notes epistatic interaction with MC1R V60L - a statistical interaction, NOT a network edge. No known pigment mechanism, not a melanocyte eGene. Needs manual review.

melanocyte_eqtl_gene: none (CCND1 not a melanocyte eGene; bulk-only call)
connecting_edges: CCND1-CREB1/CREBBP/CTNNB1 (STRING T3); CCND1 is a documented MITF transcriptional target
confirming_experiment: Melanocyte eQTL in larger panel + test rs638640 effect on CCND1; MITF ChIP at CCND1 promoter
notes: ORAOV1 nearest; bulk resolved CCND1 (cyclin D1). CCND1 is a known MITF target (Wnt/MITF->cyclinD1) but that is a PROLIFERATION output, not pigment synthesis; borderline circular. Melanocyte eQTL does NOT support (CCND1 not a melanocyte eGene) - bulk-only. Weakest of the connected set.

connecting_edges: SIK1 phosphorylates CRTC -> gates CREB->MITF; MC1R-cAMP-PKA inactivates SIK; not in our layers
confirming_experiment: SIK-inhibitor (or SIK1 KO) melanin assay in melanocytes for the risk allele (Fisher-lab paradigm)
notes: SIK1 = salt-inducible kinase 1. Genuine melanogenesis link: MC1R->cAMP->PKA inhibits SIK1/2, de-repressing CRTC->CREB->MITF and boosting melanin (small-molecule SIK inhibitors darken skin). p=1.01e-8, replicated. Known biology UNIQUELY enables (silent in all our network layers). Real finding.
